scope: Visible Book grouped selector sheet and market identity carry-through proof
fixtureNote: UI proof uses deterministic backend-contract-shaped fixture markets with marketId/outcomeId/marketType/period/line/side/probability/depth fields.

assertions.selectorSheet: order-book-market-selector-sheet exposes Moneyline Totals Spreads grouped choices with market type, line, period, and depth labels
assertions.totalsCarryThrough: selected-market-mexico-ecuador-total selected-family-Totals selected-outcome-over selected-side-yes selected-market-type-totals selected-line-2.5 selected-period-regulation
assertions.spreadCarryThrough: selected-market-mexico-ecuador-spread selected-family-Spreads selected-outcome-yes selected-side-yes selected-market-type-spread selected-line-1.5 selected-period-regulation
assertions.ticketCarryThrough: ticket-selection-summary Mexico -1.5 spread ticket-selection-line Yes provider-source-polymarket-fixture provider-token-token-spread-yes-15
assertions.ladderPreserved: order-book-ask-level-yes-1 and order-book-bid-level-yes-1 remain visible after selector market change

remainingGaps: Selector sheet is visible parity for mobile Book market switching; backend provider route behavior remains owned outside this Agent B change.
Fixture data remains deterministic UI proof only when the backend route is absent.
